property.name: symlinkedDocumentRoot
property.description: The actual document root that is used by the apache server.

property.name: nextContentLocation
property.description: Location of the to-be-deployed-content. Value should be identical to document root as specified in the apache plugin CI

property.name: previousContentLocation
property.description: Location of the previously-deployed-content. For rollback purposes.

property.name: actualContentLocation
property.description: Location of the actual-currently-deployed-content. The symlinkedDocumentRoot should be linked to this location.

property.name: flushVarnish
property.description: Flush Varnish after rollback or deploy.

property.name: hostVarnish
property.description: Hostname of the Varnish server in case cache is to be flushed after rollback or deployment.
